title: eleocharis geniculata var. minor
intro: Eleocharis geniculata var. minor, also known as dwarf spike-rush, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sedge family, characterized by its short stature and linear, pointed leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Eleocharis geniculata var. minor are attributed to its ability to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, with the roots and stems being used for their medicinal properties.
